events.label: The Creation
events.description: God creates the heavens and the earth

events.label: Adam & Eve in the Garden
events.description: The Fall and departure from Eden

events.label: Enoch and the City of Zion
events.description: Enoch prophesies; Zion taken up to heaven

events.label: The Great Flood
events.description: Noah's ark and the destruction of the wicked

events.label: Tower of Babel / Jaredites depart
events.description: Languages confounded; Jaredites journey to the promised land

events.label: Abrahamic covenant established
events.description: God's covenant with Abraham: land, posterity, and priesthood

events.label: Abraham offers Isaac
events.description: The supreme test of faith on Mount Moriah

events.label: Jacob/Israel and the 12 tribes
events.description: Jacob receives covenant blessings; fathers of the 12 tribes

events.label: Joseph sold into Egypt
events.description: Joseph's brothers sell him; he rises to power in Egypt

events.label: Exodus from Egypt
events.description: Moses leads Israel out of bondage

events.label: Parting of the Red Sea
events.description: God divides the waters for Israel's escape

events.label: Law given at Sinai
events.description: Ten Commandments and the Mosaic covenant

events.label: Tabernacle constructed
events.description: Israel builds a portable sanctuary in the wilderness

events.label: Israel enters the Promised Land
events.description: Joshua leads Israel across the Jordan

events.label: Fall of Jericho
events.description: Walls fall after Israel marches around the city

events.label: Samuel called as prophet
events.description: The boy Samuel hears the Lord's voice in the temple

events.label: Saul anointed first king
events.description: Israel demands a king; Samuel anoints Saul

events.label: David becomes king
events.description: David anointed king over all Israel

events.label: David conquers Jerusalem
events.description: Jerusalem established as Israel's capital

events.label: Solomon's Temple dedicated
events.description: The First Temple built on Mount Moriah

events.label: Kingdom divides: Israel & Judah
events.description: Ten northern tribes split from Judah after Solomon's death

events.label: Elijah and the prophets of Baal
events.description: Fire from heaven on Mount Carmel

events.label: Elisha's ministry
events.description: Elisha succeeds Elijah with miraculous ministry

events.label: Isaiah called as prophet
events.description: Isaiah sees the Lord in the temple; prophesies of Christ

events.label: Fall of Northern Kingdom (Israel)
events.description: Assyria conquers Samaria; 10 tribes scattered

events.label: Jeremiah called as prophet
events.description: Jeremiah called from the womb to warn Judah

events.label: Lehi warned to leave Jerusalem
events.description: Lehi's vision; family departs before the destruction

events.label: Lehi's family arrives in promised land
events.description: The Lehite colony reaches the Americas

events.label: Nephi builds a temple
events.description: Nephi constructs a temple after the manner of Solomon

events.label: Babylonian captivity begins
events.description: Nebuchadnezzar destroys Jerusalem and Solomon's Temple

events.label: Ezekiel's vision of the valley of dry bones
events.description: Symbolic prophecy of Israel's restoration

events.label: Cyrus conquers Babylon
events.description: Persian Empire rises; Cyrus allows Jews to return

events.label: Jews return from Babylonian exile
events.description: First wave of exiles return to Jerusalem under Zerubbabel

events.label: Second Temple completed
events.description: Zerubbabel's Temple rebuilt on the original site

events.label: Nehemiah rebuilds Jerusalem's walls
events.description: The city restored as a fortified capital

events.label: Malachi prophesies
events.description: Last Old Testament prophet; foretells Elijah's return

events.label: King Benjamin's address
events.description: Great covenant speech at the temple in Zarahemla

events.label: Abinadi martyred
events.description: Abinadi testifies before King Noah and is burned

events.label: Alma establishes the Church
events.description: Believers baptized at the Waters of Mormon

events.label: Alma the Younger's conversion
events.description: Angel appears; Alma transformed from persecutor to prophet

events.label: Sons of Mosiah mission to the Lamanites
events.description: 14-year mission results in thousands of conversions

events.label: Captain Moroni raises the Title of Liberty
events.description: Rallying cry for freedom of religion and families

events.label: Samuel the Lamanite prophesies
events.description: Prophecies of Christ's birth and death from the city wall

events.label: Birth of Jesus Christ
events.description: Born in Bethlehem; signs appear in the Americas

events.label: John the Baptist begins preaching
events.description: Voice crying in the wilderness; baptizes at the Jordan

events.label: Jesus baptized by John
events.description: Baptism in the Jordan; the Spirit descends as a dove

events.label: Jesus begins public ministry
events.description: Calling of the Twelve; begins teaching in Galilee

events.label: Sermon on the Mount
events.description: The Beatitudes and the higher law taught

events.label: Transfiguration
events.description: Moses and Elijah appear on the mount with Christ

events.label: Triumphal entry into Jerusalem
events.description: Jesus enters Jerusalem as the promised Messiah

events.label: The Last Supper
events.description: Jesus institutes the sacrament with His apostles

events.label: Crucifixion of Jesus Christ
events.description: Atonement and death at Golgotha; destruction in the Americas

events.label: Resurrection of Jesus Christ
events.description: Christ rises on the third day; appears to many

events.label: Day of Pentecost
events.description: The Holy Ghost poured out; 3,000 baptized

events.label: Christ appears to the Nephites
events.description: The resurrected Lord descends at the temple in Bountiful

events.label: Christ teaches the Sermon at the Temple
events.description: Beatitudes and higher law given to the Nephites

events.label: Twelve Nephite disciples called
events.description: Christ organizes His church in the Americas

events.label: Conversion of Saul (Paul)
events.description: Vision of Christ on the road to Damascus

events.label: Paul's first missionary journey
events.description: Gospel carried to Cyprus and Asia Minor

events.label: Council of Jerusalem
events.description: Apostles decide Gentile converts need not follow Mosaic law

events.label: Paul's second missionary journey
events.description: Gospel reaches Greece; churches established in Corinth, Philippi

events.label: Paul imprisoned in Rome
events.description: Paul writes prison epistles: Ephesians, Philippians, Colossians

events.label: Peter and Paul martyred
events.description: Apostles killed during Nero's persecution

events.label: Destruction of Jerusalem & the Temple
events.description: Romans destroy Herod's Temple; Jews dispersed

events.label: John writes Revelation on Patmos
events.description: Apocalyptic vision of the last days and Christ's return

events.label: Nephite golden age ends
events.description: Two centuries of peace after Christ's visit begin to decline

events.label: Mormon begins abridging the records
events.description: Mormon compiles the Nephite record at age 24

events.label: Battle at Cumorah
events.description: Final Nephite battle; 230,000 slain

events.label: Moroni seals the record
events.description: Last Nephite prophet buries the golden plates

events.label: First Vision
events.description: Joseph Smith sees God the Father and Jesus Christ

events.label: Angel Moroni visits Joseph Smith
events.description: Moroni reveals the location of the golden plates

events.label: Joseph receives the golden plates
events.description: Plates obtained from the Hill Cumorah

events.label: Aaronic Priesthood restored
events.description: John the Baptist confers the priesthood on Joseph and Oliver

events.label: Melchizedek Priesthood restored
events.description: Peter, James, and John confer the higher priesthood

events.label: Book of Mormon translation completed
events.description: Translation finished; Three Witnesses see the plates

events.label: Book of Mormon published
events.description: 5,000 copies printed by E.B. Grandin in Palmyra

events.label: Church organized
events.description: The Church of Christ organized with 6 members in Fayette, NY

events.label: Saints gather to Kirtland, Ohio
events.description: First major gathering of the Saints

events.label: Land of Zion dedicated in Missouri
events.description: Temple lot dedicated in Independence, Missouri

events.label: Word of Wisdom revealed
events.description: D&C 89: health code given as revelation

events.label: Doctrine and Covenants published
events.description: Revelations compiled and published

events.label: Kirtland Temple dedicated
events.description: First temple of the Restoration; pentecostal outpouring

events.label: Moses, Elias, and Elijah appear in Kirtland Temple
events.description: Priesthood keys restored including sealing power

events.label: Saints driven from Missouri
events.description: Extermination order; Haun's Mill massacre

events.label: Saints settle in Nauvoo, Illinois
events.description: Nauvoo becomes the gathering place of the Saints

events.label: Baptism for the dead introduced
events.description: Vicarious ordinances revealed; temple work begins

events.label: Book of Abraham published
events.description: Translated from Egyptian papyri; published in Times and Seasons

events.label: Articles of Faith written
events.description: 13 statements of core beliefs in the Wentworth Letter

events.label: Martyrdom of Joseph and Hyrum Smith
events.description: Prophet and Patriarch killed at Carthage Jail
